title: Front, rear, left, and right audio-tactile PPS
citation: Matsuda, Y., et al. (2021). Peripersonal space in the front, rear, left and right directions for audio-tactile multisensory integration. Scientific Reports.
notes: Four body-relative direction blocks. The template represents one direction block; duplicate with azimuth/body orientation changes for front, rear, left, and right.

provenance.source: Methods report one block as 100 bimodal, 40 unimodal, and 60 catch trials.
Methods report 3000 ms pink noise moving between 10 and 110 cm with T1-T5 at 300-2700 ms.
